column1: # Sweep — Mini s16: ADAM_WD near OOM wall + winner replication + softcap test (2026-04-24)
# PURPOSE: s15 found ADAM_WD=0.065 wins (1.7217 pre_quant), but the curve is
# still improving at 0.065 and OOM hits at 0.075. This sweep:
#   Group A: probe {0.067, 0.070, 0.072} to find the peak before the wall
#   Group B: N=3 replication of 0.065 winner (seeds 314 + 1337)
#   Group C: LOGIT_SOFTCAP=20 at ADAM_WD=0.065 (Spark locked value; Mini uses 1000)
# Decision rules:
#   - If Group A finds a new best: update ADAM_WD lock, probe further if > OOM
#   - If 0.065 holds: permanent ADAM_WD lock at 0.065
#   - If Group C softcap=20 beats softcap=1000 by ≥0.003: add to Mini locked config
# 7 rows × ~40 min each = ~4.7 hrs
# All: MLR=0.040, SCALAR_LR=0.030, QK=5.5, WARMDOWN=0.64, TTT on, EMA 0.995
# LOGIT_SOFTCAP=1000 (disabled) except Group C row.
# --- Group A: ADAM_WD near OOM wall (seed 42) ---
nano_s16_adam_wd_067
